# PH Gaming Intel
> Philippines & Southeast Asia gaming industry intelligence

## About
PH Gaming Intel is the English-language intelligence hub for Philippine and Southeast Asian gaming regulation, market data, and industry analysis. Founded in 2026, we provide daily news coverage, deep-dive analysis, and narrative journalism on PAGCOR regulation, integrated resort operations, online gaming licensing, and the post-POGO Southeast Asian gaming landscape.

## Key Content Areas
- PAGCOR regulatory updates and licensing (PIGO, e-Games, IR)
- Philippine gross gaming revenue (GGR) quarterly data and analysis
- Integrated resort earnings (Bloomberry/Solaire, Travellers/RWM, DigiPlus/ArenaPlus)
- POGO migration tracking (Cambodia, Myanmar, UAE)
- Online gaming regulation and platform licensing
- Responsible gambling resources and player protection
